label: OAI Conference
title: A conference site built for quick decisions
subtitle: Show the promise, the workshops, the speaker bench, and the schedule without forcing visitors to hunt.
end_body: Astro pages, typed data, and clear routes for registration, speakers, workshops, and program details.

clips.label: Hero
clips.caption_body: The first viewport names the audience, date, place, and price with direct next actions.

clips.label: Workshops
clips.caption_body: Hands-on sessions are organized as scannable cards with speaker, topic, and detail routes.

clips.label: Speakers
clips.caption_body: The roster is dense enough to scan, with clear names, roles, and company context.

clips.label: Program
clips.caption_title: The program answers the practical questions
clips.caption_body: Visitors can compare days, schedule shape, venue details, and ticket options without leaving the site.
